name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
description: A mutual NDA created by a committee of over 40 attorneys representing technology vendors, procurement teams, boutique firms, and Big Law. Covers reciprocal confidentiality obligations between two parties.

name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
description: The cover page template for the Common Paper Mutual NDA, used to capture the specific business terms before incorporating the standard terms by reference.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: A comprehensive agreement for selling and buying cloud software and SaaS products, created by a committee of over 40 attorneys. Covers subscription terms, order forms, and standard commercial terms.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: A Service Level Agreement designed to be used alongside the Common Paper Cloud Service Agreement. Defines uptime commitments, remedies, and measurement methodology for cloud services.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: A Data Processing Agreement covering GDPR and privacy law compliance obligations when a vendor processes personal data on behalf of a customer.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: A standard agreement for early-stage design partner relationships, allowing a vendor to work closely with a customer to co-develop and refine a product before general availability.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: An agreement governing professional services engagements including consulting, implementation, and custom development work, with support for statements of work and deliverables.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: A standard agreement governing reseller, referral, and technology partnership relationships between two companies, including revenue sharing and partner obligations.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: A HIPAA-compliant Business Associate Agreement for use when a vendor handles Protected Health Information (PHI) on behalf of a covered entity or another business associate.

name: Software License Agreement
description: An agreement for licensing on-premise or downloadable software, covering license grants, restrictions, support terms, and commercial terms for software products.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: A short-term agreement allowing a prospective customer to evaluate a product or service before committing to a longer-term commercial contract. Suitable for paid or free pilot engagements.

name: AI Addendum
description: An addendum addressing AI-specific terms such as data usage for model training, AI output ownership, accuracy disclaimers, and responsible AI obligations, intended to supplement existing service agreements.
